title: Surgeon Vacancy at Boehringer Ingelheim India - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Surgeon Vacancy at Boehringer Ingelheim India - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Surgeon looking for your next big career move? Boehringer Ingelheim India in Lucknow offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Boehringer Ingelheim India:
Boehringer Ingelheim India is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Medical Terminology
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Boehringer Ingelheim India!
